title: CompetencyEvidence
description: An Evidence node — organizational proof of a competency: a project, reference, certification, repository, methodology or benchmark. Connected to competencies via the 'evidenced_by' relation. Derived organizational maturity (competency-maturity.schema.json) is grounded in these nodes.

id.description: Evidence identifier. Grammar: 'evidence:' prefix + dot-separated slug levels, each matching [a-z0-9-] (e.g. 'evidence:acme-rag-pilot').

description.description: Optional longer description of the evidence

url.description: Optional link to the evidence (repository, certificate, document, benchmark result)

date.description: Optional ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) the evidence was produced or issued
